findings.description: Section s5 consolidates the entire 業務日付機能 chapter (> 2000 chars) without splitting despite the source having 6 distinct h3/h4 subsections: テーブル定義, 複数の業務日付の設定, 設定ファイル (date_BusinessConfiguration), 日付の上書き機能, 業務日付のメンテナンス, BusinessDateUtilで不足する場合. Per V3 rule, when an h2-equivalent source section exceeds 2000 chars and contains h3 subsections, the knowledge file should split accordingly.
findings.source_evidence: Source h3 headings under 業務日付機能: テーブル定義, 複数の業務日付の設定, 設定ファイル (date_BusinessConfiguration), 日付の上書き機能, 業務日付のメンテナンス, BusinessDateUtilで提供される機能では不足している場合の対応方法

findings.description: The source includes a Java code example under the dbTransactionName property that provides decision guidance on whether to set the property: if `DbConnectionContext.getConnection()` (no-argument form) works, the property can be omitted; if `DbConnectionContext.getConnection("appTransactionName")` is used, the argument value must be set here. This concrete code-based decision rule is omitted from the knowledge file, which only states 'デフォルトのトランザクション名使用時は省略可' without the diagnostic code.
